manifest.name: markdown-to-jsx
manifest.description: Convert markdown to JSX with ease for React and React-like projects. Super lightweight and highly configurable.

scripts.prepublish: in-publish && npm run build && npm run release || not-in-publish
scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production babel index.js --out-file dist/cjs.js --source-maps --no-comments && NODE_ENV=production BABEL_ENV=esm babel index.js --out-file dist/esm.js --source-maps --no-comments
